description_long: This ornate sconce features a central vertical stem from which five elegantly curved arms extend outward, each supporting a cup-shaped bulb holder. The arms are symmetrically arranged and adorned with decorative scrollwork, giving the fixture a classic, vintage appearance. Hanging from each arm are teardrop-shaped crystal ornaments that add a touch of luxury and refract light for a sparkling effect. The main structure appears to be made of a polished metal, likely brass or a similar alloy, with a glossy finish that enhances its sophisticated look. The sconce is designed to be mounted from the ceiling, with a sturdy central rod providing support. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional chandeliers, blending both functional lighting and decorative artistry.
description: A vintage-style ceiling-mounted sconce with five arms, cup-shaped bulb holders, and hanging crystal ornaments, finished in polished metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five arms symmetrically arranged, with crystal ornaments clearly visible beneath each bulb holder.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth of the central stem, with all decorative elements still visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the bulb holders and the attachment point to the ceiling, with less emphasis on the crystal ornaments.
description_view_3: Side view showing the profile of the arms and the vertical alignment of the central stem, with the layered arrangement of the bulbs and crystals.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a vintage, classical design with ornate scrollwork and hanging crystal elements, reminiscent of traditional European chandeliers. Its polished metal finish and symmetrical arm arrangement evoke a sense of elegance and luxury.
